recipes.title: Spaghetti Carbonara
recipes.description: A classic Italian pasta dish made with eggs, cheese, pancetta, and pepper.
recipes.ingredients: 400g spaghetti, 200g pancetta, 4 eggs, 100g parmesan, black pepper, salt
recipes.instructions:
1. Cook spaghetti in salted boiling water.
2. Fry pancetta until crispy.
3. Beat eggs with grated parmesan.
4. Drain pasta and toss with pancetta.
5. Remove from heat, add egg mixture and toss quickly.
6. Season with black pepper and serve.

recipes.title: Greek Salad
recipes.description: A refreshing Mediterranean salad with crisp vegetables and tangy feta cheese.
recipes.ingredients: 2 tomatoes, 1 cucumber, 1 red onion, 200g feta cheese, olives, olive oil, oregano, salt
recipes.instructions:
1. Chop tomatoes, cucumber, and red onion into chunks.
2. Add olives and crumbled feta cheese.
3. Drizzle with olive oil.
4. Season with oregano and salt.
5. Toss gently and serve.

recipes.title: Chicken Curry
recipes.description: A warm and aromatic chicken curry with a rich, creamy sauce.
recipes.ingredients: 500g chicken breast, 1 onion, 3 cloves garlic, 400ml coconut milk, 2 tbsp curry powder, 1 tbsp oil, salt
recipes.instructions:
1. Cut chicken into bite-sized pieces.
2. Sauté onion and garlic in oil.
3. Add chicken and cook until browned.
4. Stir in curry powder and cook for 1 minute.
5. Pour in coconut milk and simmer for 20 minutes.
6. Season with salt and serve with rice.
